hero.subtitleLine1: Upload your study materials and let AI instantly transform them into summaries, quizzes, and flashcards.
hero.subtitleLine2: Turn hours of reading into minutes of mastering.

aiSummarization.description: Turn long PDFs or texts into concise, easy-to-understand summaries in seconds.
aiSummarization.title: AI Summarization

fileSupport.description: Support for PDF, Text, and even Youtube Video links (coming soon).
fileSupport.title: File Support

flashcards.description: Memorize key concepts faster with automatically generated flashcards.
flashcards.title: Flashcards

gamifiedLearning.description: Earn XP and keep your streak alive to stay motivated every single day.
gamifiedLearning.title: Gamified Learning

smartQuizzes.description: Test your knowledge with AI-generated quizzes tailored to your material.
smartQuizzes.title: Smart Quizzes

trackProgress.description: Visualize your learning journey with streaks, heatmaps, and performance stats.
trackProgress.title: Track Progress

features.subtitle: Everything you need to ace your exams in one platform.
features.title: Why CobyLearnAi?

quizVisual.flashcardQuestion: "What is the term for the movement of water across a semi-permeable membrane?"
quizVisual.questionTitle: What is the primary function of the mitochondria in a cell?

quiz.desktopDescription: Static reading is passive. Our system generates dynamic quizzes and flashcards based specifically on your materials to ensure active recall and long-term retention.
quiz.mobileDescription: Static reading is passive. The system generates dynamic quizzes and flashcards based on your own material to build long-term retention.
quiz.mobileTitle: Practice Smarter With AI Generated Quizzes

summary.desktopDescription: Don't get buried in hundreds of pages. Our AI extracts core concepts, definitions, and key takeaways so you can grasp the big picture in minutes.
summary.desktopTitle: Instantly Turn Study Notes Into Summaries
summary.mobileDescription: Don't get buried in hundreds of pages. AI extracts core concepts and key takeaways so you can grasp the big picture in minutes.
summary.mobileTitle: Instantly Turn Study Notes Into Clear Summaries

items.answer1: Yes! You can get started for free. We also plan to offer premium features for power users in the future.
items.answer2: Currently we support text-based PDFs and raw text. Handwriting recognition is in our roadmap!
items.answer3: We use advanced LLMs to ensure high accuracy, but we always recommend reviewing the summaries against your original notes.

finalCta.subtitle: Join our community of students and start learning smarter today.
finalCta.title: Ready to Transform Your Grades?

footer.tagline: Empower your learning journey with AI

mascot.description: Coby helps you stay focused with friendly guidance while you summarize, quiz, and review. Learn faster without feeling overwhelmed.
mascot.title: Meet your study buddy
